title: Better Movement Addons
description:
Upgrade Minecraft’s movement with double jump, dash, and roll all balanced to fit perfectly into vanilla gameplay

Simple. Smooth. Feels like it should have always been there.
body:
Upgrade Minecraft’s movement with smooth, vanilla-friendly abilities like double jump, dash, and landing roll.

Jump mid-air, dash forward for speed, and roll on landing to reduce fall damage — all using intuitive controls based on normal movement keys.

Includes sound effects, smooth mechanics, and an in-game guide book so you can start instantly.

Feels like it should have always been part of Minecraft.
